---
title: "Theodore Packert" 
about:
  template: jolla  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/profile.png
  image-width: 16em
  image-shape: round # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/theodore-packert
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: Resume_2026_copy.pdf
      target: _blank
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:tcp1@geneseo.edu
---


Theodore Packert is a recent graduate from SUNY Geneseo.

## Education

State University of New York at Geneseo | Geneseo, NY <br>
B.S. in Data Analytics | Aug 2022 - May 2026 <br>
Minor in Political Science

## Experience
